description_long: This is a military-style jet airplane with a sleek, aerodynamic fuselage painted in a brown and tan camouflage pattern. The aircraft features a pointed nose, a bubble canopy cockpit, and twin jet engines mounted on either side of the fuselage near the wings. The wings are swept back and positioned low on the body, each bearing roundel insignias. The tail section includes a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers, forming a conventional tail design. The surface appears metallic and smooth, with visible panel lines and markings typical of combat aircraft.
description: A brown and tan camouflaged jet airplane with swept-back low wings, twin side-mounted engines, and a bubble canopy cockpit.
description_view_0: Side view showing the pointed nose, bubble canopy, twin engines, and swept-back wings with roundels.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the full wingspan, camouflage pattern, and tail configuration.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with clear visibility of the engine and wing details.
description_view_3: Front view emphasizing the narrow fuselage, cockpit canopy, and the alignment of the wings and engines.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, swept-back wings with no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted on either side of the fuselage near the wings.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle retractable landing gear, with two main gear and one nose gear visible.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed bubble canopy cockpit, likely single or tandem seat.
